basic_details.job_title: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Professional Intern Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Professional Intern Notification 2026 has been released on 07 July 2026 on the official website of V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Professional Intern Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years as on 06-08-2026. Upper Age Limit is relaxable in deserving cases.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree, Degree in Law, English Typing and Stenography Knowledge
qualification.details: Professional Intern (Stenography): Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University. Knowledge of English Typing and Stenography with a minimum speed of 40 words per minute in English Typing and 80 words per minute in English Shorthand. Professional Intern (Legal): Degree in Law from a recognized National/International University.

selection_process: Interview Skill Test Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.vocport.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.vocport.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Professional Intern posts is 06 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Professional Intern post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Professional Intern posts at V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Professional Intern (Stenography)?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's Degree and proficiency in English Typing (40 wpm) and Stenography (80 wpm) for the Stenography post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Professional Intern posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Professional Intern posts is 30 years as of 06 August 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Professional Intern position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 30,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Interview, Skill Test, Document Verification, and the preparation of a Merit List.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted in Offline mode by sending the application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority?
faq.answer: The official website of V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority is www.vocport.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. Where is V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority located?
faq.answer: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority is located in Tuticorin, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 628004.
